title: asarina geniculata
intro: Asarina geniculata, also known as Clarkia geniculata, is a flowering plant in the evening primrose family. It is native to the western United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Asarina geniculata include reducing fever, promoting digestive health, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use.
